resources.string: Select an investment method to continue.
Automated monthly investments to build wealth steadily over time.
Make a one-time investment with your available funds today.

At Velvet Investing (“Velvet”, “we”, “our”, “us”), we value your trust and are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, share, and safeguard your information when you use our website, mobile application, and related services.
By accessing or using Velvet Investing, you agree to the practices described in this Privacy Policy.

Full Name, Mobile Number, Email Address, Date of Birth, PAN and other KYC-related information, and bank account details. Even details of payments made for transaction or through our website such as security, expenses, assets, liabilities, goals, and investment preferences.
IP address, device type and operating system, browser type, app usage data, log files, Cookies and similar technologies.
Investment instructions, holdings and funds, fixed deposit transaction details, KYC status, Portfolio tracking results, Mutual fund performance, Download history, for report/tax statements.
We may use your information to:
Verify your identity and comply with KYC regulations.
Provide financial planning, investment, and reporting services.
Facilitate mutual fund transactions and manage your portfolio through our licensed partners.
Personalize your user experience and provide recommendations.
Communicate important updates, offers, news, and account notifications.
Analyze platform performance, security, and user experience.
Comply with legal obligations, tax, audit, and anti-fraud requirements.

Where required, we process your data based on your consent. You can withdraw at any time. In other situations, for compliance with applicable laws, or legitimate business purposes such as fraud prevention, platform security, and service improvement.
We do not sell your personal data. We may share your information only as needed to provide our services with:
Mutual fund house/AMC, payment, banking, and wealth management partners.
CRM, analytics, communication, cloud hosting, and customer support providers.
Regulatory bodies or judicial authorities when required by law or as requested.
Professional advisors, auditors, or legal consultants under confidentiality agreements.

We maintain reasonable physical, organizational, and administrative safeguards to protect your information against unauthorized access, release, loss, alteration or destruction. Please note that no method of transmission over the internet, or any method of electronic storage, is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
We retain your information only as long as necessary to provide our services, meet legal obligations, resolve disputes, and support trust.
Our website may use cookies to help you adjust to preferred preferences, and analyze traffic.
Subject to applicable law, you have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of your personal data.
Our platform may contain links to third-party sites. We are not responsible for their independent policies.
Velvet Investing is for individuals legally eligible for financial services.
We may update this policy. Continued use denotes your acceptance.
5th Floor, One Horizon Centre, DLF Phase 5, Golf Course Road, Gurugram, India.
